task_objective: fix: Sanitize non-finite correlations before scoring interactions
design_decisions: Treated None, NaN, and Infinity as 0.0 in InteractionEngine score calculation.
Ensured average absolute correlation scoring is deterministic and stable.
Verified that AlertEngine and Report serialization already handle non-finite values (NaN/Inf) by converting them to None or skipping them in rule checks.
results: Non-finite correlations no longer propagate to column scores, ensuring stable selection of interaction variables even with zero-variance columns. Other parts of the codebase were found to be robust due to existing JSON serialization sanitization.
